args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Maginnis%'

val_args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Maginnis%'

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

val_args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
